title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Amazon India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Amazon India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Amazon India Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Backend Developer based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Amazon India Advisory Limited:
Amazon India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India Advisory Limited!
